title: Compound Cobblemon
description: Modpack for the Compound Cobblemon server!
body:
Compound Cobblemon!
Welcome to the new and exciting world of Compound Cobblemon! 
Here we work hard to ensure fresh content that keeps the server engaging and most importantly of all an exciting experience!
Being a new server we are open and listening for feedback on what we could do better to bring our player base an even better experience! 
Discord Link: https://discord.gg/Att8hfx6sb 

Mods!
Terralith! 🌲
Incendium! 🔥
Nullscape! 🌌
Backpacks! 🎒
Farmers Delights and Addons! 👨‍🍳
Fight or Flight! 
Friends and Foes! 
In Game Voice Chat! 🎤
Emotes! 
Megas!

Important Features!
Full Economy! 💰
Pokedex! 📔
Player run gyms! 🫵
Keep Inventory! 🦺
Mob Spawning On! 🧟‍♂️🐑
Furniture! 🪑 
More Wood Types!

Along with over 100+ pokemon 
And many other server features to expand on the experience

And even more coming soon!
